original_image_tags: A faded pink or salmon-colored archival page, likely the reverse side of a document, showing bleed-through text from the front. There are two hole-punch marks at the top. The page features multiple stamped receipt dates and faint, reversed text.

elements.description: One pinkish-orange page with two dark punch holes at the top. It contains multiple stamped elements, including upside-down text at the top reading 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT' and 'F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', a stamped date 'AUG 8 9:28 PM '47', and a right-side-up stamped block at the bottom reading 'RECEIVED AUG 11 10 20 AM '47', 'INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I.', 'Dept of Justice Filled F 1948'. Faint mirrored text from the reverse side is visible through the paper.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text from stamps (e.g., 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT', 'AUG 8 9:28 PM '47') while Description A only vaguely mentions 'multiple stamped receipt dates' without quoting any text, creating a contradiction in quoted content where one side provides specific text the other omits or cannot read.
